name: ml-intern
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        huggingface /

      ml-intern  

    
      🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
summary: 🤗 ml-intern 是一个开源机器学习工程师项目，能自动阅读论文、训练模型并部署 ML 模型，值得关注因为它实现了端到端 AI 研发流程的自动化。

name: Open-Generative-AI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Anil-matcha /

      Open-Generative-AI  

    
      Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
summary: Open-Generative-AI是一个开源、无审查的AI图像与视频生成平台，提供200多种模型（如Flux、Midjourney等），支持自托管且完全免费，因其开放性和无内容限制而值得关注。

name: build-your-own-x
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        codecrafters-io /

      build-your-own-x  

    
      Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
summary: 该项目通过从零开始重新构建各种流行技术来帮助开发者掌握编程，值得关注因为它提供了实践学习的宝贵资源。

name: posthog
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        PostHog /

      posthog  

    
      🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
summary: PostHog 是一个全栈开发者平台，提供产品分析、会话回放、功能开关等工具，帮助开发者快速构建和优化产品，值得关注因为它整合了多种开发与数据分析功能于一体。

name: free-claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Alishahryar1 /

      free-claude-code  

    
      Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
summary: 该项目提供免费使用Claude AI代码工具的方式，支持终端、VSCode插件和Discord平台，值得关注因为它让开发者能便捷地免费体验Claude的代码功能。

name: claude-context
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        zilliztech /

      claude-context  

    
      Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
summary: 该项目是一个为Claude代码设计的代码搜索MCP工具，能够将整个代码库作为上下文提供给任何编码代理，值得关注因为它提升了AI编码助手的上下文理解能力。

summary: Vaultwarden 是一个用 Rust 编写的非官方 Bitwarden 兼容服务器，因其轻量高效且支持 Bitwarden 客户端而值得关注。

name: DeepEP
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        deepseek-ai /

      DeepEP  

    
      DeepEP: an efficient expert-parallel communication library
summary: DeepEP是高效的专家并行通信库，专注于优化大规模AI模型训练中的通信效率，值得关注因其能显著提升分布式训练性能。
